name: laas
description: PROJECT LAAS — fully procedural open world in the browser (WebGPU)

scripts.import:mojave: tsx tools/import/build.ts --id mojave --dem reference/import/mojave-dem.tif --ortho reference/import/mojave-ortho.png --bounds -116.52,36.48,-116.48,36.52 --profile desert
scripts.import:fetch-mojave: mkdir -p reference/import && curl -fsSL 'https://elevation.nationalmap.gov/arcgis/rest/services/3DEPElevation/ImageServer/exportImage?bbox=-116.52,36.48,-116.48,36.52&bboxSR=4326&size=512,512&format=tiff&pixelType=F32&noDataInterpretation=esriNoDataMatchAny&interpolation=RSP_Bilinear&adjustAspectRatio=true&f=image' -o reference/import/mojave-dem.tif && curl -fsSL 'https://imagery.nationalmap.gov/arcgis/rest/services/USGSNAIPImagery/ImageServer/exportImage?bbox=-116.52,36.48,-116.48,36.52&bboxSR=4326&size=512,512&format=png&f=image' -o reference/import/mojave-ortho.png
scripts.import:nsw-blue-mountains: tsx tools/import/build.ts --id nsw-blue-mountains --dem reference/import/nsw-blue-mountains-dem.bin --ortho reference/import/nsw-blue-mountains-ortho.png --bounds 150.25,-33.78,150.31,-33.72 --profile oceania --label 'NSW: Blue Mountains (Katoomba)' --state nsw --tile nsw-c11-r04 --region oceania --zone tablelands
scripts.mavlink:install: python3 -m venv tools/mavlink/.venv && tools/mavlink/.venv/bin/pip install -r tools/mavlink/requirements.txt
scripts.import:fetch-nsw-sydney-coast: mkdir -p reference/import && tsx tools/import/fetchTerrariumDem.ts reference/import/nsw-sydney-coast-dem.bin 151.25 -33.9 151.31 -33.84 512 && curl -fsSL 'https://maps.six.nsw.gov.au/arcgis/rest/services/public/NSW_Imagery/MapServer/export?bbox=151.25,-33.9,151.31,-33.84&bboxSR=4326&size=512,512&format=png&f=image' -o reference/import/nsw-sydney-coast-ortho.png
scripts.import:nsw-sydney-coast: tsx tools/import/build.ts --id nsw-sydney-coast --dem reference/import/nsw-sydney-coast-dem.bin --ortho reference/import/nsw-sydney-coast-ortho.png --bounds 151.25,-33.9,151.31,-33.84 --profile oceania --label 'NSW: Sydney Coast (Bondi)' --state nsw --tile nsw-c13-r04 --region oceania --zone hunter-sydney
scripts.import:fetch-nsw-dubbo-slopes: mkdir -p reference/import && tsx tools/import/fetchTerrariumDem.ts reference/import/nsw-dubbo-slopes-dem.bin 148.58 -32.28 148.64 -32.22 512 && curl -fsSL 'https://maps.six.nsw.gov.au/arcgis/rest/services/public/NSW_Imagery/MapServer/export?bbox=148.58,-32.28,148.64,-32.22&bboxSR=4326&size=512,512&format=png&f=image' -o reference/import/nsw-dubbo-slopes-ortho.png
scripts.import:nsw-dubbo-slopes: tsx tools/import/build.ts --id nsw-dubbo-slopes --dem reference/import/nsw-dubbo-slopes-dem.bin --ortho reference/import/nsw-dubbo-slopes-ortho.png --bounds 148.58,-32.28,148.64,-32.22 --profile oceania --label 'NSW: Western Slopes (Dubbo)' --state nsw --tile nsw-c09-r06 --region oceania --zone western-slopes
